name: legalquants
description: Official LegalQuants Claude Code plugin. Read-only access to the LegalQuants community knowledge corpus for approved members.

plugins.name: lq
plugins.description: LegalQuants community access in Claude Code — one connector over the community's chat archive + curated knowledge vault, with /lq:start (personalized orientation), /lq:ask (cross-source answers), /lq:assess, and /lq:update (draft your Living Profile from your own community footprint). Members sign in with their LegalQuants account. v0.7.0.
